title: Radiant Capital - Rekt II
relevance_summary: Multi-signature wallet exploit involving compromised private keys and low threshold for execution

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a critical contract to an external address.

red_flags: low threshold for multi-sig wallet execution
transfer of critical contract ownership to malicious contract
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a critical contract to an external address.
summary: Radiant Capital suffered a catastrophic security breach due to a multi-signature wallet exploit, resulting in the loss of over $53 million. The attack exploited a low threshold for executing transactions, allowing the attacker to transfer ownership of critical contracts and drain funds. A guard could have detected and blocked such transfers.
